message:
fix(guard): save/restore FILE_RESERVATIONS_ENFORCEMENT_ENABLED in three env tests

Three tests did not include FILE_RESERVATIONS_ENFORCEMENT_ENABLED in their
EnvGuard::save calls, making them fragile when the test runner has this env
var set to "false". The guard logic keys primarily off this variable, so
tests that assert is_guard_gated() == true or expect MissingAgentName would
fail if the var leaked in from the environment.

Fixed tests:
- is_guard_gated_with_worktrees_enabled
- is_guard_gated_with_git_identity_enabled
- guard_check_full_missing_agent_name_returns_error

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
